original_image_tags: hand-drawn sketch labeled "Illustration No. 2". A rectangular shape, presumably the house, is drawn in the upper right. A circle labeled "C" (likely the witness position) is drawn to the left. A circle labeled "B" is drawn in the lower right. An arrow labeled "N" points toward the upper left. Dashed lines connect point C to points A (a window on the rectangle) and B. Handwritten annotations along the lines include: "Light appeared in this direction", "3/4 mile", "apparent direction of light", "Disappeared in this direction".

elements.description: Typed paragraph numbered 3 describing a sighting of a light moving rapidly in a southerly direction from a window, referencing a sketch.

Hand-drawn sketch labeled 'Illustration No. 2' in the bottom right. The sketch depicts a rectangular floor plan at the top right with a circled 'A' indicating a viewing point, and a path below with arrows indicating movement. Handwritten labels include '3/4 mile', 'Light appeared in this direction', 'Appeared brighter', and circled letters 'B' and 'C'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the existence of a hand-drawn sketch labeled 'Illustration No. 2', a rectangular floor plan, and several labeled circles/arrows with matching specific text like '3/4 mile' and 'Light appeared in this direction', but they disagree on the exact labels of specific elements (e.g., 'A' vs 'C' for the witness/viewing point).
